problem: Let $f(x)=x^2-2x$. What is the value of $f(f(f(f(f(f(-1))))))$?

classified_questions.question: How would you describe the given function $f(x)$?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: Continuing this process, what is the value of $f(f(f(-1)))$?
